zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins於大約1385年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍卡利可莫時，她的父親King Ardgal MacMahon22歲，母親Queen Margaret de la Herne22歲。她於大約1404年與Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins于大约1385年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍卡利可莫时，她的父亲King Ardgal MacMahon22岁，母亲Queen Margaret de la Herne22岁。她于大约1404年与Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacMahon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McMahon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Kieran, Maeve, Seamus, Brigid, Connor, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, James Patrick.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Mathghamhna, a patronymic from the byname Mathghamhain literally meaning ‘good calf’, a kenning for ‘bear’. This was the name of two (unrelated) chieftain families in counties Clare (Thomond) and Monaghan (the kingdom of Oriel). See also Mahon 1, and Mahoney . In northern Ireland it is sometimes Anglicized as Matthews , since Matha was the Irish form of the Biblical name (see McMath ). In Scotland Matheson was used to translate both of these surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins was born about 1385, in Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Ireland, her father, King Ardgal MacMahon, was 22 and her mother, Queen Margaret de la Herne, was 22. She married Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster about 1404, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1427, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins est née environ 1385, à Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Irlande, son père, King Ardgal MacMahon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Queen Margaret de la Herne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster environ 1404, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins um 1385 in Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Ardgal MacMahon 22 und ihre Mutter Queen Margaret de la Herne 22. Sie hat um 1404 in Irland Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins è nata il circa 1385 nel Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Irlanda, sua padre, King Ardgal MacMahon, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Queen Margaret de la Herne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster circa 1404, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higginsが約1385年にアイルランドコウントイ トイロンカーリクモーで生まれた時，父King Ardgal MacMahonは22歳，母Queen Margaret de la Herneは22歳であった。約1404年にアイルランドでOwen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins(이)가 대략 1385년 아일랜드 카운티 타이론 카릭모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Ardgal MacMahon(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Margaret de la Herne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 아일랜드에서 Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, Un: Tewkesbury, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Irlanda, seu pai, King Ardgal MacMahon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Queen Margaret de la Herne, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster aproximadamente 1404, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1427, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins родилась около 1385 г. в местности карриккмор, коунти тироун, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Ardgal MacMahon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Queen Margaret de la Herne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster около 1404 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins nació aproximadamente 1385, en Carrickmore, County Tyrone, Irlanda, su papá, King Ardgal MacMahon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Queen Margaret de la Herne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster aproximadamente 1404, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1427, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
